data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of assigning staff/resources to counters by shift. However, the evidence provided does not include any details or references to how staff or resources are assigned to counters, nor does it demonstrate any functionality related to this requirement. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage, as the linked use case mentions the need for such assignments but lacks concrete evidence to support it.
gaps: No evidence of staff/resources assignment to counters by shift.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
